mapper.insert:
replace into t_amz_payment_report ( report_type, date_time, settlement_id, transaction_type, order_id, sku, quantity, store, fulfillment, order_city, order_state, order_post_code, tax_collection_model, product_sales, product_sales_tax, shipping_credits, shipping_credits_tax, gift_wrap_credits, gift_wrap_credits_tax, regulatory_fee, tax_on_regulatory_fee, promotional_rebate, promotional_rebate_tax, marketplace_withheld_tax, selling_fees, fba_fees, other_transaction_fees, other_fees, total, tax_amount, total_amount, createtime, opttime ) values
( #{item.reportType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.dateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.settlementId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.transactionType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.sku,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.store,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.fulfillment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.orderCity,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.orderState,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.orderPostCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.taxCollectionModel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.productSales,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.productSalesTax,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.shippingCredits,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.shippingCreditsTax,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.giftWrapCredits,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.giftWrapCreditsTax,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.regulatoryFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.taxOnRegulatoryFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.promotionalRebate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.promotionalRebateTax,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.marketplaceWithheldTax,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.sellingFees,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.fbaFees,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.otherTransactionFees,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.otherFees,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.total,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.taxAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.totalAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.createtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.opttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
